hero.headline: Your Property Deserves to Shine
hero.subheadline: Professional power washing & soft washing services that restore your home's beauty and protects your investment.

services.title: House Washing
services.description: Restore your home's curb appeal with our safe, effective soft washing system. We gently remove years of dirt, algae, mildew, and grime from siding, brick, stucco, and more — without damaging your surfaces.

services.title: Roof Cleaning
services.description: Black streaks and moss don't just look bad — they shorten your roof's lifespan. Our soft wash roof cleaning safely eliminates algae and stains, extending your roof's life by years.

services.title: Driveway & Concrete
services.description: Oil stains, tire marks, and years of buildup disappear under our professional-grade surface cleaning equipment. Driveways, sidewalks, patios, and pool decks restored to like-new condition.

services.title: Deck & Fence Restoration
services.description: Bring your outdoor living spaces back to life. We clean and restore wood, composite, and vinyl decks and fences, prepping them perfectly for staining or sealing.

services.title: Commercial Washing
services.description: First impressions matter. Keep your storefront, parking lot, drive-through, and building exterior spotless with scheduled commercial power washing services.

services.title: Soft Washing
services.description: For delicate surfaces that can't handle high pressure. Our soft wash system uses specialized cleaning solutions at low pressure to safely clean roofs, siding, and painted surfaces.

testimonials.name: Sarah M.
testimonials.text: SudsAway completely transformed the look of our home! The siding went from dingy and green to bright white. Couldn't be happier with the results.

testimonials.name: James R.
testimonials.text: I was amazed at the difference in my roof — those ugly black streaks are completely gone. Professional, on time, and the price was very fair.

testimonials.name: Linda K.

testimonials.name: John R.
testimonials.text: Mike made my house look like it was brand new!

faq.question: What's the difference between pressure washing and soft washing?
faq.answer: Pressure washing uses high-pressure water (1,300-3,100 PSI) for tough surfaces like concrete and driveways. Soft washing uses low pressure (under 500 PSI) with specialized cleaning solutions, making it safe for delicate surfaces like roofs, siding, and painted wood.

faq.question: Is soft washing safe for my roof?
faq.answer: Absolutely. Soft washing is the method recommended by shingle manufacturers like GAF and CertainTeed. High-pressure washing can damage shingles and void your warranty. Our soft wash method cleans effectively without any risk to your roof.

faq.question: How often should I have my house washed?
faq.answer: We recommend exterior house washing every 1-2 years depending on your environment. Homes in shaded or humid areas may benefit from annual cleaning to prevent algae and mildew buildup.

faq.question: What precautions do you take to protect plants and pets?
faq.answer: Our cleaning process uses professional-strength solutions that can be harsh on plants and pets. We take precautions by pre-rinsing landscaping, covering delicate plants, and asking that pets be kept inside during service. We always rinse treated areas thoroughly when finished.

faq.question: Do you offer free estimates?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide completely free, no-obligation estimates. Call us or fill out our contact form and we'll get back to you quickly — usually within a few hours.

faq.question: Are you licensed and insured?
faq.answer: Yes, SudsAway ProWash is fully licensed and insured, including general liability insurance. Your property is always protected when you work with us.
